query:
SELECT c.code, GROUP_CONCAT(l.id ORDER BY l.lessonOrder) as lessonIds
FROM courses c
JOIN lessons l ON l.courseId = c.id
WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM quiz_questions q WHERE q.lessonId = l.id) = 0
GROUP BY c.code
ORDER BY c.code;
